requirement_source: PRD: orvex-studio-workflows (4IF3xjIdAs, status draft) + Architecture: orvex-studio-workflows (JiIyp0RLLJ, canonical) + Architecture Audit — SE-Arch review (7LGGFR5tGE). PRD is draft but detailed; arch is canonical and unusually mature. FR/NFR ids (FR-W1..W18 with W12 removed per D-S11; NFR-W1..W8) drive coverage; buildable A-W/F-*/OQ-W workstream ids added.

stories.title: [workflows] Repo/module/image/OpenBao-path rename migration (OQ-W1/WS-20)
[workflows] Namespace + task-queue consolidation carrying in-flight grace sleeps (OQ-W2)
[workflows] CI bootstrap: go vet/build/test-race + CS lints + cell-lint required status (F-CI)
[workflows] WorkflowReplayer harness + recorded histories + workflow.GetVersion gate (A-W5/NFR-W1)
[workflows] GitOps hygiene: vestigial manifests, httproute, dead Temporal secret wiring, README (F-HTTPROUTE/F-SECRETS)
[workflows] Temporal constants + idempotent schedule-init generalization (FR-W14)

epics.title: [EPIC] workflows: Contract seam & shared-lib client integration

stories.title: [workflows] Land clerk.* CE catalog + payload schemas in contracts with golden-fixture round-trip (F-SEAM)
[workflows] Per-domain step-API OpenAPI + retry-class annotations authored in contracts (A-W3)
[workflows] Versioned append-only workflow input/result types (FR-W16/NFR-W1)
[workflows] Lib-codegen activity clients replacing hand-rolled (rebuild + billing) (deps table/lib OQ-L5)

epics.title: [EPIC] workflows: Retry taxonomy & delivery hardening (G2 loss-window fixes)

stories.title: [workflows] AUTHORITATIVE unbounded + BEST-EFFORT retry classes (NFR-W5/A-W4)
[workflows] Dispatcher already-started = ACK; NACK only on transient (FR-W6/A-W1)
[workflows] Trigger spec.delivery retry/backoff + deadLetterSink DLQ + depth alerting (FR-W6/NFR-W7)
[workflows] DLQ-as-record: malformed/unsupported dispositions replace ACK-and-drop (FR-W6/A-W8)
[workflows] Long-retry + workflow-failure alerting + operator-replay runbook (NFR-W5/FR-W15)

epics.title: [EPIC] workflows: Observability, cell contract & residency posture

stories.title: [workflows] Per-domain SLIs + metrics + OTel spans feeding LGTM (FR-W15)
[workflows] Cell-contract compliance: CELL_ID/CLUSTER_NAME/healthz + orvexcell stamping (F-CELL a/b)
[workflows] ID-only Temporal payloads: drop OrgName (F-PAYLOAD)
[workflows] ce-id from Svix message id + Idempotency-Key propagation (F-DEDUP/NFR-W2)
[workflows] Read-only admin Temporal-view endpoint for console (NFR-W6 amendment)

epics.title: [EPIC] workflows: Tenant-lifecycle domain — provision/deprovision/reconcile + polymorphic tenancy + entitlements

stories.title: [workflows] Operate + verify the shipped Clerk pipeline: Svix 401/502/200 + 1MB cap (FR-W1)
[workflows] ProvisionWorkflow org-liveness guard — non-retryable stop on deleted org (FR-W2)
[workflows] User-keyed personal-tenant provisioning + polymorphic workflow-ID (FR-W2/FR-W17, D-S17)
[workflows] Free-plan entitlement create on provision — AUTHORITATIVE billing step-API (FR-W18)
[workflows] DeprovisionWorkflow disable→grace→purge + entitlement revoke (FR-W3/FR-W18)
[workflows] ReconcileWorkflow corrective remediation — dry-run first, bounded (FR-W4)
[workflows] Grace-window cancel signal + purge confirmation gate (FR-W5)
[workflows] Studio-side cutover: re-point at identity mirror + workload identity + retire 404 carve-out (FR-W7)
[workflows] Keycloak-tenant lifecycle via identity-emitted CloudEvents on the spine (FR-W17)
[workflows] Cell-routed activity targets via the identity tenant→cell registry (F-CELL c)
[workflows] RebuildTenant checkpointed workflow: namespace→walk→delta-repull→alias-swap→retire (FR-W8)
[workflows] RebuildCell parent fan-out + ContinueAsNew + progress query (FR-W9)
[workflows] CE-on-spine rebuild enqueue Trigger + dispatcher registry (FR-W10/A-W10)
[workflows] Worker fixed-replica sizing vs RTO — shadow measure + scale-up runbook, NO-KEDA (NFR-W4/OQ-W7)
[workflows] OrgUpgrade compensating workflow: mint org, re-key tenant in place, carry data+entitlements (FR-W13)
[workflows] AI tool-loop durable workflow: loop-state, activity-per-call, caps, ContinueAsNew (FR-W11)
